description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular electrical circuit breaker, commonly used in residential or commercial power distribution panels. The front face features a prominent black switch labeled '20', with clear white markings indicating its amperage rating and additional technical information such as type, voltage, and manufacturer details. The sides are solid and robust, with several molded protrusions and recessed areas for secure mounting within an electrical panel. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and unadorned, designed to fit snugly alongside other breakers in a row. The overall construction is of durable black plastic, with some metallic internal components implied for electrical connectivity. Its design is utilitarian, prioritizing safety, durability, and ease of manual operation.
description: A compact black circuit breaker with a labeled switch and technical markings, designed for secure mounting in electrical panels. The object features a robust plastic body with molded details and a prominent toggle switch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the labeled switch (20) and technical markings, with the toggle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the molded mounting features and recessed areas, with no visible labels or switches.
description_view_2: Top view displays a flat, featureless surface, emphasizing the rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing mounting details and a solid exterior.
